title: Air-Fried Syrian Pork Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense dish perfect for a lazy Sunday, featuring tender pork marinated in aromatic spices that are halal-friendly.

ingredients.name: Pork loin
ingredients.notes: Skinless and boneless for easier air-frying

ingredients.name: Allspice berries
ingredients.notes: For a more authentic flavor profile

ingredients.name: Red bell peppers
ingredients.notes: Chopped for color and texture contrast

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Sliced thinly for crispiness after air-frying

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Pressed to release flavors, finely minced

instructions: Mix olive oil with salt and pepper. Rub it on the pork evenly.
Tie allspice berries in a small piece of cheesecloth or a coffee filter for easier removal.
Combine marinated pork, red bell peppers, onions, garlic, and allspice berries in an air fryer basket. Place inside your air fryer
Air-fry at 200°C (392°F) for 15 minutes. Check doneness by pressing the meat; it should be firm but no longer pink.
Remove pork from air fryer and let rest for about 5 minutes before slicing thinly across the grain. Slice peppers as well, if needed for presentation.
Serve hot with a side of tahini sauce or za'atar for added flavor and texture.
